children.text: at least 20 gross tons as measured under , or an alternate tonnage measured under as prescribed by the Secretary under ; andsection 14502 of this titlesection 14302 of this titlesection 14104 of this title
on a voyage from a port in the United States.
state the period of effectiveness of the agreement;
include the terms of any wage, share, or other compensation arrangement peculiar to the fishery in which the vessel will be engaged during the period of the agreement;

children.label: A
children.text: total not less than 3,100 calories; and

children.label: B
children.text: include adequate water and minerals in accordance with the United States Recommended Daily Allowances; and
